title: psychotria triflora
intro: Psychotria triflora, also known as the yellow-flowering psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Psychotria triflora is often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, and is commonly consumed as a tea or tincture.
